results.title: How I Extend My Healthspan, Lifespan & Slow My Aging - NOVOS
results.content: # Diet & Nutrition: How NOVOS Founder & CEO Extends His Healthspan, Lifespan & Slows His Aging. In this post, I illustrate this with an example of how a single, commonly neglected nutrient deficiency can wreak havoc on your health and longevity, which diets and foods I make a point to avoid, and discuss the specifics of my diet and its logic.**. I began experimenting with diets when I was 13, from high protein, low fat in my early teens; to 40:30:30 in my late teens; South Beach Diet and similar diets in my early and mid 20’s; Paleo in my late 20’s; keto for much of the first half of my 30’s; until I eventually resolved to follow a diet based on the most scientific evidence for overall health and longevity, and that also happens to make me feel my best.

results.title: NOVOS | Clinically Studied Longevity Platform for Healthspan & Aging
results.content: ### NOVOS Core Clinical is our most researched formulation, the foundation of the NOVOS longevity system, and one of the most powerful clinically studied supplements to date. NOVOS Core Clinical is **one of the few** longevity formulations **ever evaluated** in **randomized, placebo-controlled human clinical research**. Backed by 7+ years of R&D, NOVOS Core Clinical was studied as a complete formula, including randomized, placebo-controlled human research, not inferred from isolated ingredient studies. In a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled human clinical trial, NOVOS Core Clinical demonstrated statistically significant improvements versus placebo across validated cardiovascular biomarkers used in aging research.\*. NOVOS is a science-driven longevity system designed to support the biological processes that shape how you age. Explore NOVOS’ evidence-based tools, protocols, and research to help you measure, understand, and improve your biological aging. NOVOS formulations are created specifically to support healthy aging using research-backed ingredients that work together rather than in isolation. NOVOS is designed for adults who want to proactively support healthy aging and take a science-led approach to longevity.
